kv8.7:5.1.pli: Atthi tattha cakkhāyatanaṁ atthi rūpāyatanaṁ, tena cakkhunā taṁ rūpaṁ passatīti?

kv8.7:5.3.pli: Atthi tattha ghānāyatanaṁ atthi gandhāyatanaṁ, tena ghānena taṁ gandhaṁ ghāyatīti?

kv8.7:5.5.pli: atthi tattha cakkhāyatanaṁ atthi rūpāyatanaṁ, tena cakkhunā taṁ rūpaṁ passatīti?

kv8.7:5.7.pli: Atthi tattha jivhāyatanaṁ atthi rasāyatanaṁ, tāya jivhāya taṁ rasaṁ sāyati …pe…

kv8.7:5.8.pli: atthi tattha kāyāyatanaṁ atthi phoṭṭhabbāyatanaṁ, tena kāyena taṁ phoṭṭhabbaṁ phusatīti?

kv8.7:6.2.pli: atthi tattha manāyatanaṁ atthi dhammāyatanaṁ, tena manena taṁ dhammaṁ vijānātīti?

kv8.7:6.4.pli: Atthi tattha ghānāyatanaṁ atthi gandhāyatanaṁ, tena ghānena taṁ gandhaṁ ghāyatīti?

kv8.7:6.6.pli: atthi tattha manāyatanaṁ atthi dhammāyatanaṁ, tena manena taṁ dhammaṁ vijānātīti?

kv8.7:6.9.pli: atthi tattha kāyāyatanaṁ atthi phoṭṭhabbāyatanaṁ, tena kāyena taṁ phoṭṭhabbaṁ phusatīti?

kv8.7:7.1.pli: Atthi tattha ghānāyatanaṁ atthi gandhāyatanaṁ, na ca tena ghānena taṁ gandhaṁ ghāyatīti?

kv8.7:7.3.pli: Atthi tattha cakkhāyatanaṁ atthi rūpāyatanaṁ, na ca tena cakkhunā taṁ rūpaṁ passatīti?

kv8.7:7.5.pli: atthi tattha ghānāyatanaṁ atthi gandhāyatanaṁ, na ca tena ghānena taṁ gandhaṁ ghāyatīti?

kv8.7:7.8.pli: atthi tattha manāyatanaṁ atthi dhammāyatanaṁ, na ca tena manena taṁ dhammaṁ vijānātīti?

kv8.7:8.2.pli: atthi tattha kāyāyatanaṁ atthi phoṭṭhabbāyatanaṁ, na ca tena kāyena taṁ phoṭṭhabbaṁ phusatīti?

kv8.7:8.5.pli: atthi tattha manāyatanaṁ atthi dhammāyatanaṁ, na ca tena manena taṁ dhammaṁ vijānātīti?

kv8.7:9.1.pli: Atthi tattha ghānāyatanaṁ atthi gandhāyatanaṁ, tena ghānena taṁ gandhaṁ ghāyatīti?

kv8.7:9.3.pli: Atthi tattha mūlagandho sāragandho tacagandho pattagandho pupphagandho phalagandho āmagandho vissagandho sugandho duggandhoti?

kv8.7:10.1.pli: Atthi tattha jivhāyatanaṁ atthi rasāyatanaṁ, tāya jivhāya taṁ rasaṁ sāyatīti?

kv8.7:10.3.pli: Atthi tattha mūlaraso khandharaso tacaraso pattaraso puppharaso phalaraso ambilaṁ madhuraṁ tittakaṁ kaṭukaṁ loṇiyaṁ khāriyaṁ lambilaṁ kasāvo sādu asādūti?

kv8.7:11.1.pli: Atthi tattha kāyāyatanaṁ atthi phoṭṭhabbāyatanaṁ, tena kāyena taṁ phoṭṭhabbaṁ phusatīti?

kv8.7:11.3.pli: Atthi tattha kakkhaḷaṁ mudukaṁ saṇhaṁ pharusaṁ sukhasamphassaṁ dukkhasamphassaṁ garukaṁ lahukanti?

kv8.7:12.4.pli: Nanu atthi tattha ghānanimittaṁ jivhānimittaṁ kāyanimittanti?

kv8.7:12.6.pli: Hañci atthi tattha ghānanimittaṁ jivhānimittaṁ kāyanimittaṁ, tena vata re vattabbe—

kv8.8:1.3.pli: Rūpabhavo rūpagati rūpasattāvāso rūpasaṁsāro rūpayoni rūpattabhāvapaṭilābhoti?

kv8.8:1.5.pli: nanu arūpabhavo arūpagati arūpasattāvāso arūpasaṁsāro arūpayoni arūpattabhāvapaṭilābhoti?

kv8.8:1.7.pli: Hañci arūpabhavo …pe… arūpattabhāvapaṭilābho, no ca vata re vattabbe—

kv8.8:2.3.pli: Pañcavokārabhavo gati sattāvāso saṁsāro yoni viññāṇaṭṭhiti attabhāvapaṭilābhoti?

kv8.8:2.7.pli: Hañci catuvokārabhavo gati …pe… attabhāvapaṭilābho, no ca vata re vattabbe—

kv8.8:3.1.pli: Atthi rūpaṁ rūpadhātuyā, so ca rūpabhavo rūpagati rūpasattāvāso rūpasaṁsāro rūpayoni rūpattabhāvapaṭilābhoti?

kv8.8:3.3.pli: Atthi rūpaṁ arūpesu, so ca rūpabhavo rūpagati …pe… rūpattabhāvapaṭilābhoti?

kv8.8:3.5.pli: atthi rūpaṁ rūpadhātuyā, so ca pañcavokārabhavo gati …pe… attabhāvapaṭilābhoti?

kv8.8:3.7.pli: Atthi rūpaṁ arūpesu, so ca pañcavokārabhavo gati …pe… attabhāvapaṭilābhoti?

kv8.8:4.1.pli: Atthi rūpaṁ arūpesu, so ca arūpabhavo arūpagati arūpasattāvāso arūpasaṁsāro arūpayoni arūpattabhāvapaṭilābhoti?

kv8.8:4.3.pli: Atthi rūpaṁ rūpadhātuyā, so ca arūpabhavo arūpagati …pe… arūpattabhāvapaṭilābhoti?

kv8.8:4.5.pli: atthi rūpaṁ arūpesu, so ca catuvokārabhavo gati …pe… attabhāvapaṭilābhoti?

kv8.8:4.7.pli: Atthi rūpaṁ rūpadhātuyā, so ca catuvokārabhavo gati …pe… attabhāvapaṭilābhoti?

kv8.8:5.3.pli: Nanu rūpānaṁ nissaraṇaṁ arūpaṁ vuttaṁ bhagavatāti?

kv8.8:5.5.pli: Hañci rūpānaṁ nissaraṇaṁ arūpaṁ vuttaṁ bhagavatā, no ca vata re vattabbe—

kv8.8:6.1.pli: Rūpānaṁ nissaraṇaṁ arūpaṁ vuttaṁ bhagavatā, atthi rūpaṁ arūpesūti?

kv8.8:6.3.pli: Kāmānaṁ nissaraṇaṁ nekkhammaṁ vuttaṁ bhagavatā, atthi nekkhammesu kāmā, atthi anāsavesu āsavā, atthi apariyāpannesu pariyāpannāti?
